zh.Kyburg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germany: 德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Albrecht於1256年出生在瑞士爾利吉包格時，她的父親Graf Hartmann V von Kyburg30歲，母親Élisabeth de Bourgogne17歲。她於1272年與Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburg在瑞士阿高勞芬伯格結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1283年11月20日在她的家鄉享年27歲。

zh-hans.Kyburg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germany: 德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Albrecht于1256年出生在瑞士爾利吉包格时，她的父亲Graf Hartmann V von Kyburg30岁，母亲Élisabeth de Bourgogne17岁。她于1272年与Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburg在瑞士阿高勞芬伯格结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1283年11月20日在她的家乡享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: Albrecht
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Hans, Manfred, Otto, Horst, Klaus, Arno, Heinz, Milbert, Fritz, Gerhard.

German: from the personal name Albrecht, composed of the ancient Germanic elements adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. Compare Albert . This surname is also found elsewhere in central Europe, e.g. in Czechia.
Germanized or Americanized form of Slovenian Albreht: from the personal name Albreht, of ancient Germanic origin (see 1 above).

variants.name: App
meanings: German: from a short form of the personal name Apprecht, a variant of Albrecht . See also Albert .

variants.name: Abbo
meanings: Italian (Liguria): from the personal name Abbo, a variant of the ancient Germanic name Abo, a pet form of Albrecht .
Dutch: from the personal name Abbo, a pet form of Albert .
Muslim: variant of   Abu  . Compare   Abo  .

variants.name: Aber
meanings: German: from a short form of the personal name   Albrecht  .
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Eber  .
Altered form of French Hébert (see Hebert ).

variants.name: Ahlbrecht
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Otto, Wulf.
German: variant of   Albrecht  .

variants.name: Abke
meanings: North German: from a pet form of of the personal name   Albrecht  .

variants.name: Albracht
meanings: German: variant of   Albrecht  .

variants.name: Albright
meanings: Americanized form of German   Albrecht  .
English: cognate of Albert , from the Middle English personal name Albriht, Old English Æthelbriht, a metathesized form of Æthelbeorht. Compare Allbright .
History: Jacob Albright (1759–1808), a prominent Methodist preacher, was born in Pottstown, PA, the son of a German immigrant called Johann Albrecht.

variants.name: Abel
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, French, Spanish, and Polish; Slovak (mainly Ábel) and Czech (also Ábel): from the Biblical personal name Abel, Slovak Ábel, which was used in continental Europe from the sixth century. After the Norman Conquest it was introduced to England and Scotland, where it had a brief currency in the 12th and 13th centuries before being revived in England after the Reformation. In the Book of Genesis Abel is a son of Adam, murdered by his brother Cain (Genesis 4:1–8). In Christian tradition he is regarded as a representative of suffering innocence. The Hebrew form of the name is Hebel (Latinized as Abel), from a vocabulary word meaning ‘breath’.
German: from the personal name Abel, a pet form of Albrecht .

variants.name: Aberle
meanings: South German and Swiss German: from a pet form of the personal name   Albrecht  .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Fernand, Lucien, Marcel, Normand, Cecile, Adrien, Armand, Henri, Jacques, Alban, Andre.

French, English, German, Catalan, Hungarian, Romanian, Dutch, Slovak, Czech, Croatian, Slovenian, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and Mauritian: from the personal name Albert, composed of the ancient Germanic elements adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. The standard German form is Albrecht . The name was borne by several Christian saints, notably Saint Albert of Prague, a Bohemian prince who died a martyr in 997 attempting to convert the Prussians to Christianity, and Saint Albert the Great (c. 1193–1280), an Aristotelian theologian and tutor of Thomas Aquinas. In more recent times it has been adopted as a Jewish surname.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Albrecht was born in 1256, in Kyburg, Zürich, Switzerland, her father, Graf Hartmann V von Kyburg, was 30 and her mother, Élisabeth de Bourgogne, was 17. She married Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburg in 1272, in Laufenburg, Aargau, Switzerland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 20 November 1283, in her hometown, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Albrecht est née en 1256, à Kyburg, Zurich, Suisse, son père, Graf Hartmann V von Kyburg, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Élisabeth de Bourgogne, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburg en 1272, à Laufenburg, Argovie, Suisse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 novembre 1283, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Albrecht 1256 in Kyburg, Zürich, Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Graf Hartmann V von Kyburg 30 und ihre Mutter Élisabeth de Bourgogne 17. Sie hat 1272 in Laufenburg, Aargau, Schweiz Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. November 1283 im Alter von 27 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Albrecht è nata il nel 1256 nel Kyburg, Zurigo, Svizzera, sua padre, Graf Hartmann V von Kyburg, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Élisabeth de Bourgogne, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburg nel 1272, nel Laufenburg, Argovia, Svizzera. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 20 novembre 1283, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Albrechtが1256年にスイスズuリチクイブルグで生まれた時，父Graf Hartmann V von Kyburgは30歳，母Élisabeth de Bourgogneは17歳であった。1272年にスイスアールガウラウフエンブルグでEberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1283年11月20日に故郷で27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Albrecht(이)가 1256년 스위스 즈u리치 키버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Graf Hartmann V von Kyburg(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Élisabeth de Bourgogne(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1272년 스위스 아아르가 로펜버그에서 Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1283년 11월 20일 그녀의 고향에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Albrecht nasceu em 1256, em Kyburg, Zürich, Suiça, seu pai, Graf Hartmann V von Kyburg, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Élisabeth de Bourgogne, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburg em 1272, em Laufenburg, Aargau, Suiça. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de novembro de 1283, em sua cidade natal, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Albrecht родилась в 1256 г. в местности кибург, зuрич, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Graf Hartmann V von Kyburg было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Élisabeth de Bourgogne, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburg в 1272 г. в местности лауфенбург, ааргау, Швейцария. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 20 ноября 1283 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Albrecht nació en 1256, en Kyburg, Zürich, Suiza, su papá, Graf Hartmann V von Kyburg, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Élisabeth de Bourgogne, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburg en 1272, en Laufenburg, Aargau, Suiza. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 20 de noviembre de 1283, en su pueblo, a la edad de 27 años.
